subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise be unto the First Interpreter, which is the Tongue, and unto the Second Interpreter, which is the Pen, the Lord of Pre-existence and the Beloved of all nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از مترجم اول یعنی لسان و مترجم ثانی و هو القلم مالک قدم و محبوب امم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
